statement: Manual save / Ctrl+S — Add manual save and Ctrl+S in addition to autosave. — Affects keyboard handler, User Island / header save
affected_modules: src/services/builder.service.ts; src/services/versions.service.ts; autosave hooks; src/utils/export.helpers.ts; src/utils/import.helpers.ts; local cache
ux_impact: User can actively save before closing or handing
